title: Tax offsets
description: Check whether you will receive a tax offset and how to calculate it.
keywords: offset, rebate, tax offset, tax offsets, tax rebate, ato tax offset, ato tax offsets, tax offsets australia, tax rebate australia

child_links.title: About tax offsets
child_links.description: Find out how tax offsets can reduce the tax you pay.

child_links.title: Seniors and pensioners tax offset
child_links.description: Check if you are eligible for the seniors and pensioners tax offset (SAPTO) and if you can transfer unused offsets.

child_links.title: Superannuation-related tax offsets
child_links.description: Check if you can claim a superannuation-related tax offset for you or your spouse.

child_links.title: Beneficiary tax offset
child_links.description: Check if you can get a tax offset when you receive certain Australian Government payments or allowances.

child_links.title: Private health insurance offset
child_links.description: Check if you can claim a tax offset to cover the cost of your private health insurance premium.

child_links.title: Offset for maintaining an invalid or invalid carer
child_links.description: Check if you can claim a tax offset for maintaining an invalid or invalid carer who is 16 years old or older.

child_links.title: Zone or overseas forces tax offsets
child_links.description: Check if you are eligible for a tax offset for living in a remote area or serving overseas as a member of a force.

child_links.title: Claiming a foreign income tax offset
child_links.description: Check if you can claim a tax offset for foreign tax you pay on income from another country.

child_links.title: Low income tax offset
child_links.description: Check if you are eligible for the low income tax offset (LITO).
